title: [FEAT] Attach the BYOP and media-service with `apps/ai-dungeon-master`
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Roll for authentication
gist.blurb: The AI Dungeon Master app just leveled up. We've swapped out Cloudinary for our native media service and wired up BYOP authentication, making your campaigns smoother and fully integrated.
gist.summary: The AI Dungeon Master community app now integrates BYOP (Bring Your Own Pollen) for reverse SSO authentication and replaces Cloudinary with the native Pollinations media service.
gist.impact: Players get a seamless login experience using their Pollen credits and a fully integrated media gallery for their tabletop RPG campaigns.
gist.visual_concept: Tabletop RPG theme. Polly the bee acting as a Dungeon Master, wearing a wizard hat behind a DM screen. The monitor robot is a player, holding up a fantasy landscape image (representing the new media service). D20 dice on the table.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, sitting behind a wooden Dungeon Master screen rolling a glowing 20-sided die. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head sits opposite her, excitedly holding up a generated fantasy landscape picture. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
